
# ΩQCS – Financial Institution Edition
## Model Risk Management (MRM) Framework

### 1. Model Purpose
ΩQCS provides structural decision visibility and does not calculate PD, LGD, EAD, or substitute credit scoring models.

### 2. Scope Boundary
- Non-prescriptive
- Non-advisory
- Non-rating substitutive
- Governance enhancement layer only

### 3. Model Inputs
- 12 internal structural variables
- External coefficients (M, C, R_ext)
- Market sensitivity parameters

### 4. Model Outputs
- Structural risk vector
- Collision intensity score
- Governance clarity index
- Sensitivity exposure range

### 5. Limitations
- Does not predict default probability
- Does not recommend credit approval/denial
- Dependent on input data quality

### 6. Review Frequency
Annual validation review or upon major structural change.
